effectEN: [AUTO](Front Row RC):When your other unit in the same column as this unit attacks, that unit gets [Power]+10000 until end of that battle.
flavorTextEN: I'll stay on the lookout. Now go.

effectEN:
(After a set order is played, put it into your order zone.)
Play this card if you have a vanguard with "Maelstrom" in its card name!
[AUTO]:When this card is put into your order zone, perform all of the following.
•Choose up to one unit card with only <Aqua Force> for its clan or a <Tear Dragon> from your drop, call it to (RC). 
•Choose one of your rear-guards, and it gets [Power]+5000 until end of turn for each other "Judgement Maelstrom" in your order zone.
flavorTextEN: The legendary Blue Storm Armada is said to be in complete control of the battlefield.

effectEN:
[ACT](VC)1/Turn :COST  [Discard a card from your hand], choose a unit card with only <Aqua Force> for its clan or a <Tear Dragon> from your soul, call it to (RC), it gets "[AUTO](RC):When this unit attacks, if your opponent's vanguard is grade 3 or greater , and it is the first battle of that turn, COST  [Counter Blast (1)], and [Stand] this unit." until end of turn, and at the end of that turn, put it into your soul.
[AUTO](VC):When this unit attacks a vanguard, if it is the fourth battle of that turn or more, draw a card, choose one of your opponent's rear-guards, and retire it.
flavorTextEN: The blue dragon desires order in the world. The result of that is the manifestation of absolute justice.

effectEN: [AUTO](RC):When this unit attacks, if it is the fourth battle of this turn or more, and your order zone has a Blue Storm Fleet card, this unit gets [Power]+10000, and at the end of that battle, put this unit into your soul. (This effect is mandatory)
flavorTextEN: May this strike be the end of the strife.

effectEN: [CONT](RC):If you have a vanguard with "Lianorn" in its card name, all of your other rear-guards in the same column as this unit get "Boost".
flavorTextEN: Perfectly coordinated marching brings cheers.

nameEN: Empyrean Blue Dragon, Shelling Cannon Dragon
effectEN:
[AUTO](Back Row Center RC):At the beginning of your battle phase, if your vanguard is "Flagship Dragon, Flagburg Dragon", and your opponent's vanguard is grade 3 or greater, COST  [Counter Blast (1)], until end of turn, this unit can attack from the back row, and gets [Power]+10000.
[CONT](Back Row Center RC):When you would move or swap this unit during your main phase, you can also move it within the same row.
flavorTextEN: Send this message to the flagship: "High firepower supporting fire shall commence now".

effectEN: [AUTO]:When this unit is placed on (RC) from hand, if your vanguard is grade 3 or greater, COST  [Counter Blast (1) & Soul Blast (1)], discard the top three cards of your deck, choose a card from your drop, call it to (RC) if it is a grade 2 or less card, and put it into your hand if it has the same card name as your vanguard.
flavorTextEN: The color of the blooming future...I can't wait to see it!

effectEN:
Play this with COST  [Counter Blast (1)]!
Call up to two Plant Tokens to (RC). (Plant Tokens are grade 0/[Power]5000/[Critical] 1 and have boost)
flavorTextEN: This needs to be translated.

effectEN:
[CONT](Deck/Hand):If you have a grade 2 or greater vanguard with "Sylvan Horned Beast" in its card name different from this card, this card gets grade -1.
[CONT](RC):If your vanguard with "Magnolia" in its card name was placed this turn, this unit gets [Power]+10000.
flavorTextEN: I will go anywhere for honey ♪

effectEN:
[ACT](VC)1/Turn :COST  [Soul Blast (1)], turn all of the Plant tokens on your (RC) into plant gauge, call a Noblesserose token to your back row center (RC), and put all of your plant gauges on that unit.
[AUTO](VC):At the end of the battle this unit attacked, COST  [put one or more Noblesse Rose tokens or plant gauge in a total of up to five cards into drop], choose one of your rear-guards, and it gets [Power]+5000 until end of turn for each card put into drop for this cost. If you put three or more cards, [Stand] that unit.
flavorTextEN: My dearly beloved rose! Let us protect this beautiful earth together!

effectEN: [CONT](RC):During your turn, if "Bulky Saw Stag" is on your (RC), this unit gets [Power]+10000.
flavorTextEN: This needs to be translated.

effectEN: [CONT](RC):During your turn, if "Burly Axe Beetle" is on your (RC), this unit gets [Power]+10000.
flavorTextEN: This needs to be translated.

effectEN: [AUTO](RC)1/Turn :When this unit attacks, COST  [Counter Blast (1) & retire a Plant token], and this unit gets [Power]+10000 until end of turn.
flavorTextEN: Eat this! Buuurst! Eeeeend!!

effectEN: [AUTO](RC):When this unit attacks, if it is the fourth battle of this turn or more, this unit gets [Power]+5000 until end of that battle.
flavorTextEN: The attack comes―! Now!!

effectEN: [AUTO](RC):When you play a grade 3 or greater normal order, COST  [Soul Blast (1)], and this unit gets [Power]+10000 until end of turn.
flavorTextEN: This needs to be translated.

effectEN:
[CONT]:This card can only be ridden from a grade 3 with "Zorga" in its card name.
[CONT](VC):When you would play a normal order, you can bind a normal order from your drop, and Alchemagic.
[CONT](VC):If you did Alchemagic this turn, all of your front row units get [Power]+10000.
[ACT](VC)1/Turn :COST  [Remove a card with "Zorga" in its different card name from this unit from your hand, soul or drop], choose a card from your drop, call it to (RC) if it is a unit card, or put it into your hand if it is a normal order.
flavorTextEN: This is rather well~made toy... Let's have a little fun.

effectEN:
(After a set order is played, put it into your order zone.)

effectEN: [AUTO](RC):When this unit attacks, if it is the fourth battle of this turn or more, and your order zone has a Blue Storm Fleet card, this unit gets [Power]+10000, and at the end of that battle, put this unit into your soul. (This effect is mandatory)
flavorTextEN: May this strike be the end of the strife.

nameEN: Servitude of Funeral Procession, Lianorn Masques
effectEN:
[CONT]:This card can only be ridden from a grade 3 with "Lianorn" in its card name.
[ACT](VC)1/Turn :COST  [Remove a card with "Lianorn" in its different card name from this unit from your hand, soul, or drop], choose a grade 1 or less card from your drop, call it to (RC), choose one of your opponent's rear-guards, and retire it.
[AUTO](VC):When this unit attacks, choose up to three of your back row [Stand] rear-guards with "Boost", and boost this unit with them. If you boosted this unit with three or more units, at the end of that battle, COST  [Counter Blast (1)], choose two of your rear-guards, and [Stand] them.
flavorTextEN: Even if sound disappears from the world, our music is for the world tree.

effectEN:
[AUTO]:When this unit is placed by riding from "For One's Precious Thing, Rorowa", call up to two Plant tokens to (RC), and they get "[AUTO]:When this unit is retired from (RC), draw a card." until end of your opponent's next turn. Activate persona ride.
[AUTO](VC):When this unit attacks, COST  [bind a "For One's Precious Thing, Rorowa" from soul], choose one of your [Glitter] rear-guards, until end of turn, that unit and this unit get [Power]+5000, and this unit gets [Critical]+1. At the end of that turn, ride the card bound for this cost as [Rest].
[Glitter](This card is a [Glitter] which seeks the Fire Regalis)
flavorTextEN: O multitude of lives, bloom.

effectEN: [CONT](RC):During your turn, if this unit is on a (RC) with a Dragontree marker, this unit gets "Boost", and [Power]+5000.
flavorTextEN: This needs to be translated.

effectEN:
[CONT](RC/GC):If your opponent's drive check or damage check revealed a trigger unit this turn, this unit gets [Power]+10000/[Shield]+10000.
[AUTO](RC)1/Turn :When this unit attacks, COST  [discard the top two cards of deck], and perform all of the following.
•Soul Charge (1), and this unit gets [Power]+5000 until end of turn. If all of the cards discarded for this cost are not normal units, it gets +15000 instead of +5000.
•COST  [Remove a [Over] trigger from drop], choose a unit card from your drop, and put it into your hand.
flavorTextEN: This needs to be translated.

effectEN: [AUTO](RC):When this unit attacks, if it is the fourth battle of this turn or more, this unit gets [Power]+5000 until end of that battle.
flavorTextEN: Now is the time----! Attack!!

effectEN:
[ACT](VC)1/Turn :COST  [Retire three rear-guards], until end of turn, this unit gets "[CONT](VC):All of your Plant tokens get [Power]+5000.", and drive +1.
[ACT](VC)1/Turn :COST  [Bind an order card from drop], and call up to two Plant tokens to (RC).
[AUTO](VC):When this unit attacks, COST  [Soul Blast (1)], choose one of your Plant tokens, [Stand] it, and that unit gets [Power]+5000 until end of turn for every two different order cards in total in your drop and bind zone.

effectEN:
•[Rock] Finishing Attack Type: Hitting
•Super Finishing Attack ◆ Machine Gun Punches
•[Technique] 30

•Finishing Move Type: Pinching
•Super Finishing Move: Bull Lock
•Technique: 30

•Finishing Move Type: Throwing
•Super Finishing Move: Rolling Driver
•Technique: 30

Move-[AUTO](Order Zone):When this Move is used, perform all of the following according to the attacking unit.
•Technique is 20 or greater - That attacking unit gets [Power]+5000 until end of turn.
•Finishing Move is Hitting - That attacking unit gets [Power]+5000 until end of turn.
•Super Finishing Move is "Machine Gun Punches" - At the end of the battle this Move was used, COST  [Counter Blast (1)], [Stand] the unit that attacked, and until end of turn, it gets drive -2, COST  [discard a "Machine Gun Punches" from hand], and it gets drive +1.

Move-[AUTO](Order Zone):When this Move is used, perform all of the following according to the attacking unit.
•Technique is 20 or greater - That attacking unit gets [Power]+5000 until end of turn.
•Finishing Move is Pinching - That attacking unit gets [Power]+5000 until end of turn.
•Super Finishing Move is "Bull Lock" - COST  [Counter Blast (1)], and your opponent cannot call sentinels from their hand to (GC) until end of that battle. Then, COST  [discard a "Bull Lock" from hand], choose two of your opponent's rear-guards, they cannot [Stand] during the next stand phase, and they cannot intercept until end of turn.

Move-[AUTO](Order Zone):When this Move is used, perform all of the following according to the attacking unit.
•Technique is 20 or greater - That attacking unit gets [Power]+5000 until end of turn.
•Finishing Move is Throwing - That attacking unit gets [Power]+5000 until end of turn.
•Super Finishing Move is "Rolling Driver" - COST  [Counter Blast (1)], and that attacking unit gets [Critical]+1 until end of turn. Then, COST  [discard a "Rolling Driver" from hand], and that attacking unit gets drive +1 until end of turn.

•Finishing Move Type: Hitting
•Super Finishing Move: Machine Gun Punches
•Technique: 30

nameEN: Sylvan Horned Beast Emperor, Magnolia Elder
effectEN:
[AUTO]:When this unit is placed on (VC), choose a card from your soul, and you may call it to (RC).
[CONT](VC):If you have one or more cards in your soul or on your (RC) with "Magnolia" in their card names, all of your rear-guards can attack and intercept from the back row, and get [Power]+5000.
flavorTextEN: To have the courage to see yourself reach the place you'd like to be in.

effectEN: (You may only have up to four [Heal] triggers in a deck. When revealed as a trigger, choose one of your units, and it gets [Power]+10000 until end of turn! Then, if the number of cards in your damage zone is equal to or more than your opponent's, choose a card from your damage zone, and heal it!)
flavorTextEN: The mermaids wished for peace and built a huge school city.

effectEN: [AUTO]:When this unit is rode upon, if you went second, draw a card.
flavorTextEN: "Astesice" is the most popular 6-member group.

effectEN: (When revealed as a trigger, choose one of your units, and it gets [Critical]+1 until end of turn! Then, choose one of your units, and it gets [Power]+10000 until end of turn!)
flavorTextEN: The debut single was a huge hit.

effectEN:
(You may only have one [Over] trigger in a deck. When revealed as a trigger, remove that card, draw a card, choose one of your units, and it gets [Power]+100 Million until end of turn! If revealed during drive check, activate its additional effect!)
Additional Effect - During this fight, you get "During your turn, all of your rear-guards get [Power]+10000!"

flavorTextEN: Loro will… work much, much harder!
A dream-like tea time.

flavorTextEN: Aiming towards their debut, the students polish themselves daily.

Play this if your vanguard is Archangel of Twin Wings, Alestiel!
Choose one of your attacked units, and the chosen unit gets [Power]+5000 until end of that battle for each of your rear-guards with odd grades. Until end of turn, when your unit with even grade would be retired from (RC) or (GC), you may put that card into your soul instead of the drop.

effectEN:
Play this with COST  [Counter Blast (1)]!
Draw two cards, choose a card from your hand, and discard it. Put this card into your soul.
flavorTextEN: Like a flame that illuminates my heart--

effectEN: Choose one of your units, and it gets [Power]+5000 until end of turn. Put this card into your soul.
flavorTextEN: As clear as the skies--

effectEN: [AUTO]:When this unit is rode upon, if you went second, draw a card.
flavorTextEN: That step earlier! Once more!

effectEN: (When revealed as a trigger, all of your front row units get [Power]+10000 until end of turn!)
flavorTextEN: As long as there are results, there's nothing to complain about, right?

effectEN:
Play this with COST  [Counter Blast (1)]!
Draw two cards, choose a card from your hand, and discard it. Put this card into your soul.
flavorTextEN: As though a flame is lit in their hearts--

(D-LBT01): What is important is understanding what is being sought from us.
(D-LBT03): Needs is something that changes everyday.

(D-LBT01): I see~! This will definitely come in handy later!
(D-LBT03): The accumulation of knowledge will connect you to a definite result.
Alright, line up! We'll be singing with a smile!
Fuafii? Fuofefuafafuefafiifuo?
Ready-made uniforms, are just not up to par.

effectEN: (You may only have up to four cards with "HEAL" in a deck.)
flavorTextEN:
(D-LBT01): Right here, is the garden filled with her kindness.
(D-LBT03): The air of recovery overflows, and naturally brings forth more smiles.
Those snacks, you can eat them if you want. Counting on you to refill though.
As if there's time to even stop!
Things that I want to try, I found one more today.

(D-LBT01): No matter how vigorously you dance, if you collapse on stage, it's all wasted, you know?
(D-LBT03): A charm to work hard. I'll hang it here.
This here, it’s the moment to hype it up.

effectEN:
Play this if your vanguard is "Archangel of Twin Wings, Alestiel"!
Choose one of your units being attacked, and it gets [Power]+5000 until end of that battle for each of your rear-guards with odd grades. Until end of turn, when your unit with an even grade would be retired from (RC) or (GC), you may put that card into your soul instead of the drop.
flavorTextEN: Throw away your pessimism, and accept all of yourself.

nameEN: Wings Dancing in the Blue Skies, Antia
flavorTextEN: There's still a lot so make sure you eat up~♪
Now, you girls! Stop holding us back!
Okay okay~♪ Then, I shall go greet everyone~!

effectEN: (You may only have up to four cards with "HEAL" in a deck.)
flavorTextEN: The young girl sings. Spreading from the depths of her heart, a gentle sound.
The mysterious but clear and vibrant voice, leads the pixies into a joyful dance.
You will not be able to find her in classes for a few days after the release of a new game.

effectEN: (You may only have up to four cards with "HEAL" in a deck.)
flavorTextEN: Now now, let us calm down while having tea~.
